title: erysimum pseudocheiri
intro: Erysimum pseudocheiri, also known as wallrocket, is a biennial plant in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and pungent smell. Traditionally, wallrocket has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation and acting as a natural diuretic, making it useful for treating urinary tract infections and other conditions. Herbal preparations of wallrocket can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as to support digestive health.
